Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The restaurant is filled with[n]the familiar smell of fish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}My younger brother and I were twins, but not the kind that look the same. He was the better-looking one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Everyone called me "the uglier Suemitsu." They always compared me to him... And I could never beat him at anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}There was a time when I used to hit him for no reason. But even then, he still treated me like a brother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Then in middle school, we bought steamed buns... and then he died. Food poisoning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}They said the meat was undercooked. Just his bun, though. Not mine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But I couldn't even cry. I actually felt... relieved. I thought, "Maybe they'll all finally stop laughing at me."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}What kind of person feels joy when their own brother dies? I'm such a... I'm a...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Thanks, but... I know already. I was a terrible brother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}At first, I tried to be more like him. I went to cram schools and did martial arts and everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But I could never be as good, and eventually... I started to feel like people were laughing at me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}The only time I feel safe is when I'm eating. All that matters is what's in front of me, and everything else melts away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}See? That's what the Gourmet King really is. I only eat to run away from my problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But if I keep this up, I'll never be able to replace my brother, will I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 1 25 25}You're right! I can never be like my brother! We're two different people![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}How did I miss something so obvious? Haha, I can be pretty dumb sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Thank you, {f 4 2}-kun. Really, thank you so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Suemitsu truly appreciates me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Moon Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Sandalphon{f 0 1 27}, the deliverer of prayers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Oh, I know this is sudden, but I'm relieving you of your duties as the Gourmet King's royal guard. You're fired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}...Because you're the new king. All hail Gourmet King II![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The restaurants in the strip mall gave this to me because of how often I eat there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I feel like I've been fake all this time. But one day, I will become the true Gourmet King![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I think I'll become a food critic. It'll be my job to eat—I'm gonna become a food master![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Then when I die and go to the afterlife, I can face my brother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}And then I can tell him I was the best at something for once in my life![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}So until I reclaim my crown, you can hang on to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I may have lost my title, but someday, I'll make my grand return as Gourmet King III![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's my promise to you... and to my little brother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Huh? I've been talking so much about my brother, but... I'm okay! My memories didn't make me sad and hungry this time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Oh, wow... I never realized how good the ramen tastes here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After Suemitsu finished bowl after bowl[n]of ramen, I went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
